health_details.stderr_tail:
mote server. If sequence is an a3m file, this is ignored.
    -f, --filter_samples=FILTER_SAMPLES
        Type: bool
        Default: True
        Filter out unphysical samples with e.g. long bond distances or steric clashes.
    --base_seed=BASE_SEED
        Type: Optional[int | None]
        Default: None
        Base random seed for sampling. If set, each batch's seed will be set to base_seed + (num samples already generated).

NOTES
    You can also use flags syntax for POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS

health_details.stdout_tail:
d for fixed
                        residues (default: 0)
  --force_hetatm FORCE_HETATM
                        To force ligand atoms to be written as HETATM to PDB
                        file after packing. (default: 0)
  --packed_suffix PACKED_SUFFIX
                        Suffix for packed PDB paths (default: _packed)
  --pack_with_ligand_context PACK_WITH_LIGAND_CONTEXT
                        1-pack side chains using ligand context, 0 - do not
                        use it. (default: 1)
